h3. ✅ SPECify Verification Results

*Ticket:* [PROJ-1234|https://yourteam.atlassian.net/browse/PROJ-1234]
*Spec:* {{.verify/specs/PROJ-1234.yaml}}
*Evaluated:* 2026-03-22T14:41:00Z
*Overall:* ✅ *ALL PASSED* (19/19 verifications across 3 AC checkboxes)

----

h4. ✅ AC: "User can view their profile" — 12/12 passed
*Condition:* ALL_PASS

||Ref||Description||Type||Result||
|REQ-001.success|Happy path returns correct profile data|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.FAIL-001|No auth returns 401|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.FAIL-002|Expired JWT returns 401|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.FAIL-003|Malformed JWT returns 401|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.FAIL-004|Non-existent user returns 404|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.FAIL-005|Deleted user returns 404|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.FAIL-006|Suspended account returns 403|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.FAIL-007|Pending account returns 403|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.INV-001|No cross-user data leakage|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.INV-002|Forbidden fields never in response|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.INV-005|GET is idempotent|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.schema|Response matches defined schema|test_result|(/) |

h4. ✅ AC: "Profile endpoint responds within 500ms p99" — 1/1 passed
*Condition:* ALL_PASS

||Ref||Description||Type||Result||
|REQ-001.INV-004.config|New Relic NRQL alert config exists and is valid|deployment_check|(/) |

h4. ✅ AC: "Profile data is never exposed to other users" — 5/5 passed
*Condition:* ALL_PASS

||Ref||Description||Type||Result||
|REQ-001.INV-001|No cross-user data leakage|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.INV-002|Forbidden fields never in response|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.INV-003|No stack traces in error responses|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.INV-006|Audit logging present|test_result|(/) |
|REQ-001.INV-007|PII classification header present|test_result|(/) |

----

{panel:title=Traceability Chain|borderStyle=solid|borderColor=#ccc}
Every result ← maps to a spec ref ← maps to an AC checkbox ← maps to business intent.
The AI negotiated the spec. Everything downstream was deterministic.
{panel}

_Generated by [SPECify|https://github.com/your-org/specify] — Intent-to-Verification Pipeline_
